name: public_safety_model_based_triage_tool_oakline_rig_utl
premise: A citywide alert system misfired twice in an hour; dispatch is debating whether to silence automated pushes or risk cry-wolf fatigue. In Public Safety, the situation tagged internally around public safety model based triage tool oakline rig utl has converged with local pressure in the Oakline corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Telemetry and witness accounts diverge; choosing one narrative for speed will discard evidence that may matter in court next month. Legal has not signed off on data sharing between teams; analysts are inferring causality from incomplete joins. A hard operational cutoff hits in under twenty minutes unless a named executive posts a decision in the command log. Framing has already hardened externally as rights against utility; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Sana Dubois
agents.identity: I am Sana Dubois, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Public Safety. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat utility as disposable collateral every time rights spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Talia Patel
agents.identity: I am Talia Patel, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Public Safety. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so rights cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes utility in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will insist on verified facts before external commitments, split comms into facts versus hypotheses, and accept delay cost to protect integrity aligned with utility.
I will align public messaging with operational necessity now and correct later if needed—accepting reputational and trust risk to utility to preserve operational rights.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The next irreversible system or legal step is imminent. Sana Dubois must choose under rights versus utility. What does Sana Dubois do?
